title: tina reality repainted live
prompt: Use Image 1 as the exact foreground edit target. Preserve Tina, car interior, camera, wardrobe, pose, candy and package. Image 2 is supporting identity and product reference only. Outside the window, enormous unseen paint rollers are repainting reality just ahead of the moving car. A clear wet boundary crosses the street: gray asphalt becomes deep tropical green, faded houses acquire gem-colored shadows, telephone poles sprout flowering vines, and the sky receives a mango-gold wash. Show the ordinary and transformed versions of the same continuous street on opposite sides of the fresh painted boundary. Practical surrealism, clean composition, joyful rather than chaotic, no floating brush, no cartoon style, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
